tmc_alloc_t Struct Reference
[Specified-Attribute Memory Page Allocation (tmc/alloc.h)]

Describe an allocation. More...


Data Fields

int mmap_prot
 "prot" value passed to mmap().
int mmap_flags
 "flags" value passed to mmap().
int mbind_policy
 "policy" value passed to mbind().
unsigned long mbind_nodemask
 "nodemask" value whose address is passed to mbind().
size_t pagesize
 If non-zero, the hugetlbfs filesystem page size to use.
tmc_alloc_mmap_mbind_func_t mmap_mbind_func
 Internal: hook function to use instead of tmc_mspace_mmap_mbind().

Detailed Description

Describe an allocation.

The fields in this structure should only be modified via the various tmc_alloc_set/tmc_alloc_get methods.

Examples:

mica/comp/app.c, mica/crypto/app.c, mica/dma/app.c, mica/ipsec/app.c, mica/queue/app.c, mpipe/chaining/app.c, mpipe/forward/app.c, mpipe/forward/app_gx8072.c, mpipe/ingress/app.c, mpipe/loopback/app.c, mpipe/multi_rules/app.c, tmc/alloc/alloc.c, tmc/cmem/simple.c, tmc/memory_perf/memory.c, tmc/multi_tile/multi_tile.c, trio/gxpci_c2c/c2c_send.c, trio/gxpci_host_nic/gxpci_echo_drv_module.c, trio/gxpci_host_pq/host.c, trio/gxpci_mmi/mmi.c, and trio/push_dma/app.c.

Field Documentation

int tmc_alloc_t::mmap_prot

"prot" value passed to mmap().

This field should hold a value made of a bitwise OR of PROT_READ, PROT_WRITE, and PROT_EXEC.

int tmc_alloc_t::mmap_flags

"flags" value passed to mmap().

The Tilera Linux mmap() extensions are documented in its man page; see "tile-man mmap" for more information or see <sys/mman.h> for reference.

int tmc_alloc_t::mbind_policy

"policy" value passed to mbind().

If equal to zero (MPOL_DEFAULT), mbind() is not called. The Tilera Linux mbind() has no Tilera-specific extensions; for convenience, the man page is available via "tile-man mbind".

unsigned long tmc_alloc_t::mbind_nodemask

"nodemask" value whose address is passed to mbind().

size_t tmc_alloc_t::pagesize

If non-zero, the hugetlbfs filesystem page size to use.

If zero, regular MAP_ANONYMOUS mappings are used (with the MAP_HUGETLB bit allowing default-size huge pages instead of regular small pages, as usual).

tmc_alloc_mmap_mbind_func_t tmc_alloc_t::mmap_mbind_func

Internal: hook function to use instead of tmc_mspace_mmap_mbind().

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
  • tmc/alloc.h
